---
name: "\uD83D\uDD0E UI/UX Feedback"
about: Report design or usability issues or suggest improvements
title: "[UI] Brief summary of the feedback"
labels: [ui/ux, feedback]
assignees: []
---

### 🎨 Describe the Issue or Idea
Please describe the visual/design issue you experienced or the improvement you'd like to see.

> Examples:
> - Button overlaps text on dark mode
> - Sidebar feels cluttered on 1280px screens
> - Suggest swapping icon for a more recognizable one

### 🧪 Steps to Reproduce (if applicable)
1. Open MeedyaManager
2. Go to '...'
3. Observe layout or behavior issue

### 📸 Screenshots or Screen Recording
Include any screenshots or screen captures that help illustrate the issue.

### 🧭 Platform Details
- OS and version:
- Display resolution:
- MeedyaManager version:
- Theme: [ ] Light  [ ] Dark  [ ] System

### 🤔 Severity (Subjective)
- [ ] Cosmetic / Low priority
- [ ] Moderately affects usability
- [ ] Major UX problem
- [ ] Accessibility barrier
